The ultimate goal of your emails is to get your subscribers to take action. Learn how to move them to a buying decision in this lesson.

Don’t forget… click here to download your Mastermind Business System Resource Guide and follow along!

Learn more about “invitation emails” and how they fit into the launch model in Your First (or Next) Launch.
